common.builtFor: Built for transparent, high-confidence property decisions.

footer.description: Cambodia's trusted marketplace for buyers, renters, sellers, landlords, and developers seeking verified listings and structured property workflows.

home.heroTitle: Invest, buy, and lease with higher confidence
home.heroBody: RightBricks pairs verified listing data, documentation-first workflows, and responsive advisory support to help you move faster with less risk.
home.heroOverlaySubtitle: Clear facts, trust signals, and direct inquiry pathways.
home.howStep1: Browse verified listings with structured filters.
home.howStep2: Review pricing context, media, and facts in one page.
home.howStep3: Inquire instantly and get a human response within hours.
home.whyReason2: Investor-aware insights, not generic listing copy.
home.whyReason3: Fast, accountable support via email, phone, WhatsApp, and Telegram.
home.readyForNextMove: Ready for your next property move?
home.readyBody: Explore verified inventory, save high-fit opportunities, and reach advisors without delay.

guides.phnomPenhGuideText: Yield signals, district-by-district trends, and acquisition checkpoints.
guides.buyerChecklistText: A practical review flow before paying deposits or entering negotiation.
guides.developerPlaybookText: How to present verified media and convert qualified inquiries faster.

listings.title: Browse verified listings
listings.subtitle: Search Phnom Penh, Siem Reap, Sihanoukville, and other growth corridors with confidence signals on every listing.
listings.activeFilters: Active filters applied. Use reset to return to full inventory.
listings.unavailableBody: Our listing feed is being refreshed. Please try again shortly or contact our team for current verified opportunities.
listings.noMatchTitle: No listings matched this filter set
listings.noMatchBody: Try removing one or two constraints, or return to the verified default inventory.

about.title: About RightBricks
about.subtitle: RightBricks exists to reduce uncertainty in real estate decisions through verification-first listing standards, transparent data, and responsive support.
about.verify1: Listing source legitimacy and ownership signals.
about.verify2: Media consistency, recency, and property matching.
about.verify3: Core facts used by buyers, renters, and investors.
about.whoWeServeBody: Buyers, renters, agencies, developers, and institutional teams looking for clearer property decisions in Cambodia.
about.principle1: Truth over volume: better listings beat more listings.
about.principle2: Speed with accountability: clear inquiry routing and follow-through.
about.principle3: Market context matters: localization and district-level relevance.
about.expansionNote: Expansion-ready architecture supports Phnom Penh, Siem Reap, and Sihanoukville growth tracks.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to work with a verification-first marketplace?

contact.title: Contact RightBricks Cambodia
contact.availableWhatsappTelegram: Available on WhatsApp and Telegram for faster responses.
contact.whatHappensNext: What happens next: we review your goals, confirm fit, and reply with next-step options.

contactForm.successMessage: Thanks — our team will respond within a few hours.

pricing.title: Clear, professional pricing
pricing.subtitle: Compare tier pricing, separate sign-up fees, and upfront totals before you choose.
pricing.customTierBody: Tier 4 is contact-first by design. Share your requirements and we'll scope a custom proposal.

auth.customerLoginBody: Login details are provided by our team after contact has been established.
auth.adminLoginBody: Restricted access for platform administration, operations, and content governance.
auth.serviceUnavailable: Authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send reset instructions within a few minutes.
forgotPassword.noEmailReceived: If you don't receive an email, contact {email}

consent.message: We use analytics cookies to improve listings discovery and support quality. You can change this anytime in your browser storage settings. Read our

support.title: Support Center
support.subtitle: Need listing help, valuation guidance, or account assistance? Our team is ready to help.
support.contactSoon: Our team will contact you shortly via phone or email after any enquiry submission.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.informationCollectBody: We collect account details, enquiry form data, listing submission details, and technical telemetry required to operate and secure RightBricks.
privacy.howWeUseBody: Data is used to respond to enquiries, deliver marketplace features, improve listing quality controls, prevent abuse, and maintain service reliability.
privacy.cookiesBody: Essential cookies are used for security and session management. Non-essential analytics are collected only when you provide consent through our consent banner.
privacy.sharingBody: We may share data with hosting, email, and infrastructure providers acting on our instructions. We do not sell personal data.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain enquiry and account data only as long as needed for operations, legal obligations, dispute resolution, and fraud prevention.
privacy.yourRightsBody: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data, subject to legal and operational requirements.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.marketplaceUseBody: You must provide accurate information when submitting enquiries or listings and use the platform only for legitimate property activity.
terms.listingStandardsBody: Sellers, agents, and developers must hold rights to publish listing content, pricing, and media; deceptive or unverifiable listings may be removed.
terms.prohibitedConductBody: Fraudulent activity, scraping, credential abuse, spam, and attempts to disrupt platform integrity are strictly prohibited.
terms.intellectualPropertyBody: RightBricks branding, software, and site content remain our intellectual property unless otherwise stated.
terms.disclaimersBody: RightBricks provides marketplace and intelligence tooling, but users remain responsible for independent legal, tax, and investment due diligence.

accessibility.title: Accessibility Statement
accessibility.body: RightBricks is committed to improving keyboard navigation, readable contrast, semantic structure, and accessible forms.
accessibility.contactMessage: If you experience barriers, please contact us at

account.title: Account
account.signupFeeNote: One-time sign-up fee applies to all new standard subscriptions and is collected once at activation.
account.needMoreListings: Need more than 10 listings? Contact us for a Custom Tier.
account.reachedListingCap: You have reached your listing cap. Upgrade to publish more listings.

inquiryForm.defaultMessage: Hello RightBricks, I am interested in this property. Please share more details and viewing availability.
inquiryForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us your timeline, budget, and goals.
inquiryForm.successMessage: We've received your enquiry. Our team will contact you shortly via phone or email.
inquiryForm.errorMessage: Unable to submit right now. Please contact contact@rightbricks.online or call (+855) 011 389 625.
